text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara loses in an exhibition race for an
event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On her way back home, she runs into some
spectators saying mean things about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, simply happy to overhear people
discussing her at all, she approaches the two and
asks them to cheer her on in the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators, seeing her full of spirit, end up
becoming her fans.
